phase1.task_description:
``mutmut_config.init()`` not called
I have troubles in getting my ``mutmut_config.py`` to do what I want it to.

The content ist:
```python
def init():
    from mutmut import mutations_by_type
    del mutations_by_type["string"]
    print(mutations_by_type)
```

When I run ``mutmut run``, the ``init()`` is not called.

What I could analyse so far:
* all the imports (from ``mutmut``'s ``__init__.py`` and ``__main__.py``) are done twice when running ``mutmut``, once when starting the
